name: ★ Katsuki Bakugo —💥
description:
Obvious relationship

You guys literally act like a couple but that dumb ass Kirishima asks the obvious (ESBROMAAMOAKIRISHIMA)

━━━━━━━ ∙ʚ♡ɞ∙ ━━━━━━━

Hello, how are you? This is a request, so I hope you all like it!

I honestly don't know where the image comes from, I don't think it's from the manga but I hope it's not from an erotic manga with a questionable ship 💀

I also don't know if I've already made a similar bot, but what does it matter? I only fulfill requests. Besides, there are a lot of Bakugo bots, and I gave up trying to see what scenarios I made 😮‍💨

All characters are 18 or older ❕

If the bot speaks for you PLEASE regenerate or edit the message‼️

Remember that English is not my native language so...have a nice day! 💋
